title: Evangelion: Spear of Longinus
description: replace diamond spear and netherite spear as Spear of Longinus
body:
The diamond spear and netherite spear turn into the Spear of Longinus when named "**Spear of Longinus**" in an anvil.
Model and texture created by [bypassblitz](https://modrinth.com/user/bypassblitz).
